'''Gambolla''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the same [[Star system/Legends|star system]] as [[Arcopola]], in the [[Spadja sector/Legends|Spadja sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="GNN" />

==History==
In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], [[Jatz/Legends|jatz]] musician [[Fitz Roi]] began his concert tour on Gambolla.<ref name="GNN" />

Two months later, the art collection of [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] business tycoon [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Galrowk]], one of the most prominent in the region, was robbed by the art and jewel thief known as the [[Tanda Marelle|Tombat]]. [[Inspector/Legends|Inspector]] [[Zanza Gata]] of the [[Imperial Office of Criminal Investigations/Legends|Imperial Office of Criminal Investigations]] was assigned to the case.<ref name="GNN" />
